description_long: This cabinetry unit features a modern, minimalist design with a combination of matte black and wood-textured finishes. The front face includes a countertop with a built-in sink, a cooktop, and a preparation area, all set against a black marble backsplash. Above the counter, there are sleek, handle-less upper cabinets, while the lower section integrates storage and appliance spaces. The left side of the unit appears to house a tall pantry or integrated refrigerator, adding vertical storage. The overall structure is linear and compact, suitable for urban kitchens or compact living spaces. The materials and finishes suggest a high-end, contemporary aesthetic with practical functionality.
description: A modern, linear kitchen cabinetry unit with matte black and wood finishes, featuring a countertop, sink, cooktop, and upper cabinets. The design is sleek, handle-less, and includes integrated storage and appliance spaces.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full cabinetry face, including the countertop, sink, cooktop, upper cabinets, and backsplash.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the depth of the cabinetry and the tall pantry or appliance section.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the solid back panel and the marble finish, with no visible functional features.
description_view_3: The right side view reveals the side profile of the cabinetry and the integrated appliance section.
attribute_cabinet_type: kitchen base and wall cabinet set
